usage_rules.h1: font-heading font-extrabold text-6xl md:text-8xl tracking-tighter leading-[0.9] uppercase
usage_rules.label: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground

primary.description: Electric Lime - The energy source. Use for CTAs and key highlights.

secondary.description: Deep Void Forest - The structure. Darker than standard black.

accent.description: Hot Pink - The AI spark. Use sparingly for 'magic' moments.

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

dashboard.card_style: bg-card border border-border/50 p-6 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:translate-y-[-2px] hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#000] transition-all font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 rounded-full text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-foreground text-foreground hover:bg-foreground hover:text-background transition-all font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 rounded-full text-sm
buttons.ghost: text-foreground/70 hover:text-foreground hover:bg-muted/50 px-4 py-2 rounded-md

cards.feature: group relative overflow-hidden border border-border bg-background p-8 hover:bg-muted/20 transition-all
cards.stat: flex flex-col gap-2 p-6 border-r border-b border-border/50 bg-background/50 backdrop-blur-sm

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-border focus:border-primary rounded-none px-0 py-4 transition-colors placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

hero_bg.usage: Hero section background with heavy overlay (opacity 0.1)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts link to the <head> of index.html immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to extend the theme with the colors and font families defined above. Map 'primary' to '#CCFF00' and 'forest' to '#051F1A'.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Update index.css. Remove 'Cormorant Garamond'. Add the noise texture to the body background.
4. SHADCN OVERRIDES: Customize Shadcn components. Remove default rounded-md from cards/inputs. Use sharp edges (rounded-none) for inputs/cards, but full rounded (rounded-full) for buttons.
5. LAYOUT: For the Landing Page, use the 'Tetris Grid' (bento style) for the features section. Do not stack everything in a single column.
6. DARK MODE: The Dashboard MUST be Dark Mode by default. Use the 'secondary' color (#051F1A) as the background for the dashboard.
7. IMAGES: Use the provided image URLs. Do not use placeholders.
8. ANTI-PATTERNS: Do not use standard blue/purple gradients. Do not use 'Inter' font. Do not center text in the hero section (align left with massive font size).
universal_guidelines: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Prioritize 'Syne' font for all headings to give character.
